UserInfoLoggedOut: Sign in with Steam to play competitive CS:GO (5v5) matches and earn a skill rank for FREE!
AgreementBody:
Welcome to CS:GO Community Competitive! We're happy to have you here.

Please observe these general guidelines:

  1. Never cheat, exploit, or otherwise give yourself or others an unfair advantage.
  2. Never display an extreme degree of toxicity or engage in harassment against others.
  3. Always play with integrity and a commitment to do your best to win the game. No throwing or losing intentionally.

By clicking 'ACCEPT' you agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy as well as these general guidelines. You must agree to these policies before you can access the platform and its services.
ConnectionFailureBody:
Connection was lost with the CS:GO Community Competitive servers. Possible causes include:
  • You were inactive for several hours
  • Our servers are temporarily overwhelmed or down
  • You have too many tabs on CSGOCC open
  • A rare technical glitch occurred
Unfortunately, you must reload the page to continue. If you cannot regain connection, please consider trying a different browser or waiting a few minutes. We apologize for any inconvenience.
Restriction_Body_DeviceBan: Your device has been permanently banned. This ban is permanent and non-negotiable.
Restriction_Body_CheatingBan: You've been banned for cheating or exploiting. This ban is permanent and non-negotiable.
Restriction_Body_MOSSReportPending: We've received your MOSS capture and are reviewing it. A decision will be available soon.
Restriction_Body_MOSSReportNeeded: We've detected unusual behavior during gameplay and you must submit a MOSS capture to continue playing.
Restriction_Body_GriefingBan: You've been banned from matchmaking for griefing.
Restriction_Body_ToxicityBan: You've been banned for toxic behavior. Please maintain a respectful attitude.
Restriction_Body_AbandonCooldown: You've received a cooldown for abandoning a match. Abandoning another match will result in a longer penalty.
Restriction_Body_TeamDamageCooldown: You've received a cooldown for excessive team damage. Avoid attacking teammates in the future.
